Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Checklist Completed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Checklist Completed to occur after SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Total duration of the process segment starting at SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and ending at SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants where the latter precedes the former
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to the next occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-EIC Reject in variants that end with rejection without review
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Total time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that proceed beyond initial screening
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision for cases where activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed, compared with the time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed in variants where both paths exist
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days when followed by a delay exceeding 72 hours before SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the first subsequent reminder or deadline-related activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion now due'

Name: Total time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants where export occurs after the checklist due notice
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and activity Manuscript Export Succeeded for cases where activity Manuscript Export Succeeded occurs

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and the initiation of reviewer assignment (SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept versus those leading to SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'
